title: Technoventure: Technology & Exploration
description: 1.21.1 modpack centred around tech and exploration
body:
Technoventure is a modpack centred around exploration and creating machines. It's intended not to be too overwhelming with the quantity of (sometimes conflicting) tech mods, while still having good integration with other mods in the pack through many addon mods. It doesn't feature overpowered gear or easily exploitable mods that tend to make some modpacks quite boring rather fast, and it has a decent progression to it. It also features some mods that enhance the vanilla experience of the game without getting in the way.

The most prominent mods in the pack are as follows:

Technology/Machines:

- Create (with lots of addons)
- Modern Industrialization 2
- Mekanism
- Applied Energistics 2
- Immersive Aircraft/Machinery
- Stargate Journey

Adventure/Exploration:

- Stargate Journey
- Tectonic + terrablender
- YUNG'S Better Dungeons
- The Bumblezone
- Primal Magick


This modpack started as a personal modpack with friends, originally loosely based on technical electrical, and it has been tested according to our tastes. I hope others can also appreciate it, so I've made this public version to share.


# Known Bugs

1. Stargates sometimes break, see fixes below for the fix


# Fixes

1. If stargates break for whatever reason: `/sgjourney stargateNetwork forceStellarUpdate`


# Important

Some create mods intended to be in the pack are left out in 0.1.0. This is due to them being incompatible with the latest version of create, and will be intended to be readded once updated.
